sources: National Reentry Resource Center Clean Slate Clearinghouse (nationalreentryresourcecenter.org/cleanslate)
Direct verification from each org's public website
meta.notes: v1 lean curation. Universal NRRC fallback shown for every state. Curated highlights for CA, NY, GA. Rasa Legal added as a low-cost ($25 attorney-led eligibility review) option in UT/PA/AZ. Texas curated list intentionally empty — no high-confidence free expungement-focused orgs surfaced from homepage verification at compile time; users get the NRRC fallback. Org details verified from each org's public website at compile time on 2026-04-25; details may change.

universal.label: Clean Slate Clearinghouse — Find a Lawyer
universal.description: Search the National Reentry Resource Center's clearinghouse for record-clearance attorneys in your state and ZIP code.

CA.name: Root & Rebound
CA.focus: Statewide reentry legal aid with dedicated record clearance / expungement clinics and a free reentry hotline.

CA.name: East Bay Community Law Center
CA.focus: Clean Slate program for adult criminal record relief, anchored in Alameda County / East Bay.

CA.name: A New Way of Life Reentry Project
CA.focus: Holistic reentry support including pro bono expungement legal services for women rebuilding after incarceration.

NY.name: The Bronx Defenders
NY.focus: Civil Action Practice including post-conviction record sealing assistance for Bronx residents. Call to confirm sealing intake.

NY.name: Brooklyn Defender Services
NY.focus: Civil Justice Practice serving Brooklyn and (post-July 2025) Queens; reentry and record-related civil work. Call to confirm sealing intake.

GA.name: Georgia Justice Project
GA.focus: Statewide record restriction (Georgia's expungement) services; runs Second Chance Desks and recurring criminal records info sessions.

UT.name: Rasa Legal
UT.focus: $25 attorney-led eligibility review for record clearance. Full representation is priced separately.
UT.cost_note: Eligibility review only at $25; representation fees vary.

PA.name: Rasa Legal
PA.focus: $25 attorney-led eligibility review for record clearance. Full representation is priced separately.
PA.cost_note: Eligibility review only at $25; representation fees vary.

AZ.name: Rasa Legal
AZ.focus: $25 attorney-led eligibility review for record clearance. Full representation is priced separately.
AZ.cost_note: Eligibility review only at $25; representation fees vary.
